notes: Strong problem framing and assumption quality, but critical gaps in persona specificity (no QSA, PCI DSS compliance officer, or card platform team named with cost/timing context), MVP is unbounded across five domains with no explicit deferral of QSA assessment window or Redis caching architecture, out-of-scope discipline is absent as a named section, and success indicators lack measurable baseline anchors tied to corpus-expected criteria like zero PAN in cache or all-11-migrated.
